flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Jefferson State Community College fell 38% between 2009 and 2010 (3.9% → 2.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Jefferson State Community College fell 18% between 2007 and 2010 (8.9% → 7.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Jefferson State Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (6.1k → 5.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jefferson State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).
